name: HMS Lundy (T 272)
events: 10 Mar 1943 HrMs O 10 (Lt.Cdr. Baron D.T. Mackay, RNN) participated in A/S exercises off Tobermory together with HMS Mutine (T/A/Lt.Cdr. N.E. Morley, DSC, RNVR) and HMS Lundy (T/Lt. S.J. Lavis, RNR). (1)
11 Mar 1943 HrMs O 10 (Lt.Cdr. Baron D.T. Mackay, RNN) participated in A/S exercises off Tobermory together with HMS Lundy (T/Lt. S.J. Lavis, RNR) and HMS Lady Sharazad. (1)

24 Mar 1943 Around 1400 A/24, HMS Una (Lt. J.D. Martin, RN) joined HMS P 556 (Lt.Cdr. F.H. Sherwood, RCNVR) and USS Blackfish (T/Cdr. J.F. Davidson, USN) which came from Falmouth. They were escorted by HMS Lundy (T/Lt. S.J. Lavis, RNR).
Around 1820 A/24, HMS Lundy parted company and shortly afterwards HMS La Capricieuse (Lt.Cdr. G.W. Dobson, RNR) joined. (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
